archetype: Custom Hybrid: Vibrant Play (Archetype 6) & Swiss High-Contrast (Archetype 4)
rationale: A confident, flavor-driven brand for marketing & auth surfaces inspired by Barcoop Bevy, coupled with a calm, data-dense, highly operational workspace for the inventory dashboard.

rules.h1: font-display text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ tracking-tighter leading-tight font-black
rules.h2: font-display text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-bold
rules.overline: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted font-bold

motion.marketing: Scroll-reveal stagger using Framer Motion. Elements should slide up slightly and fade in. Use spring physics for image appearances.
motion.dashboard: Subtle micro-interactions. Hover lifts (-translate-y-1) for cards. Status pills should have a gentle pulse animation for 'Critical' and 'Expired' states.
motion.camera_scan: Laser line scanning animation over the viewfinder. Flash effect on capture. Smooth height transition when OCR result card appears.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white font-body font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-brand-primary_hover transition-colors shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(37,158,126,0.39)]
buttons.accent: bg-brand-accent text-text-primary font-body font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-brand-accent_hover transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border-2 border-border-default text-text-primary rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:border-brand-primary transition-colors

status_pills.base: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono font-bold

cards.kpi_tile: bg-background-dashboard_surface border border-border-default rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow relative overflow-hidden
cards.kpi_accent_ring: absolute -right-4 -top-4 w-24 h-24 rounded-full border-4 border-brand-accent opacity-20
cards.ocr_result: bg-background-dashboard_surface border-2 border-brand-primary rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg

camera_scan.viewfinder: relative w-full aspect-[3/4] sm:aspect-video bg-black rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
camera_scan.brackets: absolute inset-4 border-2 border-white/50 rounded-xl pointer-events-none before:absolute before:inset-0 before:border-4 before:border-brand-accent before:[clip-path:polygon(0_0,20px_0,20px_4px,4px_4px,4px_20px,0_20px)]

landing.vibe: Bold, flavor-forward, high energy. Dark theme (#1A2421) hero with massive Fraunces typography, vibrant 3D/vector illustrations of groceries, and #C1D544 buttons.

auth.vibe: Split screen. Left: vibrant marketing imagery. Right: clean, off-white form with clear role selection (Worker/Manager/Admin).

dashboard_layout.vibe: Calm, functional, data-dense. Off-white (#FAF9F6) background. Sidebar navigation in dark green.
dashboard_layout.header: Sticky top bar, breadcrumbs, user profile, notification bell.

features: 4 KPI Tiles (Total, Safe, Near Expiry, Critical, Expired)
Data table with JetBrains Mono for dates and batch numbers

workflow: Validation Form (Editable fields with confidence scores)

features: List of recent OCR failures requiring manual review

warehouse_worker.description: Man managing inventory with tablet in warehouse, focusing on efficiency in storage operations.

supermarket_produce.description: Colorful assortment of fresh vegetables arranged on supermarket shelves

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute.
